auth.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link
auth.tagline: Teach what you know. Learn what you need.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errBadCredentials: That email and password didn't match.
auth.errEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.hintResetPw: Forgot your password, or signed up with Google?
auth.successSignup: Account created! Check your email for a confirmation link, then sign in.
auth.successReset: Password reset link sent — check your inbox.
auth.successResend: Confirmation email re-sent — check your inbox (and spam).

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Answer a few questions, then add what you can teach.
onboarding.mirrorQ1: What could you talk about for an hour without notes?
onboarding.mirrorQ1Ph: e.g. how I learned to cook proper risotto
onboarding.mirrorQ2: What do friends always ask you for help with?
onboarding.mirrorQ2Ph: e.g. fixing their CV, guitar chords…
onboarding.mirrorQ3: What were you doing last time you lost track of time?
onboarding.teachSearchHint: Search or add anything — a language, a craft, a niche skill.
onboarding.cvImportCta: 📄 Got a CV? Import skills from it instead
onboarding.learnSubtitle: Search anything. Can't find it? Add it.
onboarding.proficiencySubtitle: Helps us match you with the right learners.
onboarding.noTeachSkills: No teaching skills — tap continue. You can add some anytime.
onboarding.aboutSubtitle: Helps us match you locally. Only your city & language are used for matching — the rest is optional.
onboarding.cityHint: Used to match you with people nearby. City-level only — never your exact location.
onboarding.languagesHint: First selected is your main language. You can teach & learn across all of them.
onboarding.optionalHint: Helps us show our community impact to partners who fund free learning. Skip if you prefer.
onboarding.consentBody: Let us include your activity in anonymized, aggregated insights about how skills move through communities. We never sell your personal data. You can turn this off anytime.
onboarding.ctaAddSkill: Add at least one skill to teach
onboarding.welcomeBalance: You've got {amount} Time Credits to start learning.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Teach an hour, earn one back. Time is your currency.

mirror.title: Skill Mirror
mirror.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we'll suggest skills you can teach.
mirror.reviewHint: Tap to keep or drop. These become skills you teach.
mirror.added: Added {count} skill{count, plural, one {} other {s}} to teach
mirror.none: No clear skills yet — try adding a little more detail.
mirror.error: Couldn't read your answers. You can add skills manually.
mirror.q1: What could you talk about for an hour without notes?
mirror.q1Ph: e.g. how I learned to cook a proper risotto
mirror.q2: What do friends always ask you for help with?
mirror.q2Ph: e.g. fixing their CV, guitar chords…
mirror.q3: What were you doing last time you lost track of time?

home.coldStartTitle: You're early — that's a good thing.
home.coldStartBody: You've got {amount} TC ready to spend. Here's how to get going:
home.setAvailabilityHint: So learners can book you — and you earn TC
home.exploreSkillsHint: See what you could learn right now
home.addSkillsHint: The more you teach, the faster you earn
home.noTeachers: No teachers in {category} yet. Try another category or check back soon.

wallet.title: TimeCredits
wallet.learningEstimate: ≈ {count, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} of learning, anywhere
wallet.premiumPitch: TimeBank is free for individuals. You get +5 TC every month, and there is no limit on what you can hold.
wallet.noActivity: No activity yet — teach your first session to earn TC.

explore.subtitle: Find someone to learn from — or check your sessions.
explore.noTeachers: No teachers in {category} yet. You could be the first — add it to your skills!
explore.noPings: No pings right now. When someone wants to learn from you, it'll show up here.

teacher.bookedTitle: Booked! 1 TC is now held in escrow.
teacher.bookedBody: Released to {name} when you both confirm the session.
teacher.learnPrompt: What do you want to learn?
teacher.pingHint: Send a quick ping — they'll get notified.
teacher.pingPlaceholder: Hi! Are you free for a quick session? I'd love to learn…
teacher.noAvailability: No set availability — try the ping above.
teacher.defaultPing: Are you free for a session soon?
teacher.pingDuplicate: You've already sent a request to this person — wait for them to respond.

session.endConfirm: End this session? You'll both confirm and rate next.
session.aiBody: Gemini will draft a structured plan — objectives, flow, timing.
session.aiError: Couldn't generate a plan right now — you can try again, or just continue without one.
session.endNote: When you end the session, you'll both rate and confirm. The TC releases once both confirm.
session.joinHint: Tap to turn on your camera and microphone for this session.
session.avDenied: Camera and microphone are blocked. On iPhone: Settings → Apps → Safari → Camera & Microphone → Allow, then reload this page.

support.entryHint: Chat with our help assistant or reach the team
support.title: Help
support.subtitle: Ask me anything about TimeBank Academy
support.greeting: Hi! I'm the TimeBank Academy help assistant. Ask me anything about how the app works — TimeCredits, bookings, skills, safety, you name it. If I can't help, I'll pass it on to the team.
support.genericError: Something went wrong on my end — please try again in a moment.
support.emailPrompt: I'd like to pass this to the team so they can help directly. What's the best email to reach you?
support.escalatedFallback: Thanks — I've passed this to the team. They'll reply to you by email at {email}.

review.releasedBodyTeacher: Both of you confirmed — the Time Credit has moved into your wallet.
review.releasedBodyLearner: Both of you confirmed — the Time Credit has moved to {name}.
review.waitingBody: Waiting for {name} to confirm too. The TC releases once you both do.
review.title: Session complete
review.footer: Your TimeCredit releases once both of you confirm the session.

moderation.blockConfirm: Block {name}? They won't be able to ping or message you, and you won't see each other in Explore.
moderation.reportHint: Tell us what's wrong (optional). Our team reviews every report.
moderation.reportThanks: Thanks — our team will review this.

ping.noConversations: No conversations yet — accepted requests show up here.
ping.sentWaiting: Request sent — waiting for {name} to accept.

tour.balanceBody: Earn 1 by teaching an hour, spend 1 to learn. This is your balance — start with a few on us.
tour.levelBody: Teach, learn, keep streaks — climb from Time Seed all the way to TimeBank Legend.
tour.profileBody: Skills, badges and settings. Add what you can teach so learners can find you.

profile.premiumDesc: You get +5 TC every month — no cap.
